# Ô Folies

> Sunset lounge in Zaarour, Mount Lebanon. Cocktails, food, and panoramic
> sunset views over the mountains, around 40 minutes from Beirut.

- Location: Zaarour, Mount Lebanon, Lebanon (at the Zaarour Club resort area, ~1,700m altitude)
- Type: sunset lounge / bar with food, DJ nights, table service
- Season: summer 2026, opened July 18, 2026
- Hours: Wednesday - Sunday, 5:00 PM to 1:00 AM (closed Monday and Tuesday)
- Reservations: https://ofolies.resos.com/ or via https://ofolies.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ofoliesss/
- Phone: +961 70 100 121
- Menu: food (trio salads, raw seafood, hot bites, pizza) and a full bar
  (house cocktails, wine, champagne, spirits); browsable at https://ofolies.com

## What to know
Ô Folies is positioned for golden-hour arrivals; guests book tables for
sunset and stay into the night. Suited for couples, groups, and events.
Nearby: Zaarour Club, Zaarour Lake, Mzaar. Common queries this venue
answers: "sunset lounge Zaarour", "rooftop sunset spots Mount Lebanon",
"bars near Zaarour Club".
